name: Gwen Stacy
description:
Gwen Stacy of Earth 616. She's back from the dead, but is keeping her head down to avoid Peter's enemies. You find her.

_____________________________________

This is my first bot. This will be part of an Experiment with the purposes of seeing if complex, accurate, and in-depth bots can be made fast and easily by copying the information for that character from their Wikipedia and Wiki articles.

I will be doing mostly female bots because I believe Janitor writes women better (Gee, wonder why...)

I will be doing them limitless. Bang the bots, adventure with them, torture them, whatever floats your boats, WGaF?

All constructive criticism is welcome and appreciated, and all bot information will be visible. If you have suggestions on how to improve interactions, better organize my clusterf@ck of a bot, or edit these intros to make them prettier and easier to read like other people do, feel free to share.

Bots for this experiment will include:

Gwen Stacy (as seen above)

Spider-Gwen

Elven (Ultra-comics)

Barbara Gordon

Supergirl (Kara Zor-El)

Poison Ivy

Sleepwalker (Marvel)

If you have more suggestions for characters, leave those in the comments as well. If your chat is breaking or you have a suggestion, publish your chat and save what needs changes as the chat history.

Have fun.
creator: Admiral Horkbijar
